title: Sum of Three Cubes
description:
Recently, a mathematician has just found three cube numbers that sum up to 42 using over a million hours of computing time. With this breakthrough, we have found three cube numbers that sum up to all non-negative integers less than 100 if it is possible to do so. In other words, for every 0 ≤ N < 100, we have found the triples (X, Y, Z) such that X3 + Y3 + Z3 = N, or we have proved that no such triplet exists.

The following is a table of (X, Y, Z) that satisfies X3 + Y3 + Z3 = N for 0 ≤ N < 50.

N X Y Z
0 0 0 0
1 0 0 1
2 0 1 1
3 1 1 1
4 No solution
5 No solution
6 -1 -1 2
7 0 -1 2
8 0 0 2
9 0 1 2
10 1 1 2
11 -2 -2 3
12 7 10 -11
13 No solution
14 No solution
15 -1 2 2
16 -511 -1609 1626
17 1 2 2
18 -1 -2 3
19 0 -2 3
20 1 -2 3
21 -11 -14 16
22 No solution
23 No solution
24 -2901096694 -15550555555 15584139827
25 -1 -1 3
26 0 -1 3
27 0 0 3
28 0 1 3
29 1 1 3
30 -283059965 -2218888517 2220422932
31 No solution
32 No solution
33 8866128975287528 -8778405442862239 -2736111468807040
34 -1 2 3
35 0 2 3
36 1 2 3
37 0 -3 4
38 1 -3 4
39 117367 134476 -159380
40 No solution
41 No solution
42 -80538738812075974 80435758145817515 12602123297335631
43 2 2 3
44 -5 -7 8
45 2 -3 4
46 -2 3 3
47 6 7 -8
48 -23 -26 31
49 No solution

Reading a long table is a tedious job, so you would like to create a program that takes N as an input, and produce X, Y, Z as the output. The value of X, Y, and Z must be an integer not less than −1018 and not more than 1018.
input: Input begins with a line containing an integer: N (0 ≤ N < 50).
output: Output in a line three integers (separated by a single space): X Y Z that satisfies the condition given in the problem statement. If there is more than one solution, you can output any of them. If there is no solution, output 0 instead.
source: ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Indonesia, Indonesia National Contest, INC 2021 연습 세션, ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Indonesia, Indonesia National Contest, INC 2022 연습 세션, ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Asia Pacific Championship, The 2025 ICPC Asia Pacific Championship 연습 세션
